triggers.description: Only 1 qualifying supplier(s) found but policy requires 2 quotes.
Required field 'esg_score' is absent. Actions whose WHEN conditions reference this field may produce incorrect results (estimated rank impact: 0.15).
Required field 'quality_score' is absent. Actions whose WHEN conditions reference this field may produce incorrect results (estimated rank impact: 0.15).
Required field 'risk_score' is absent. Actions whose WHEN conditions reference this field may produce incorrect results (estimated rank impact: 0.15).

context_notes: Budget-adjusted escalation thresholds (budget=30,000, multiplier=0.91): blocking≥0.639, advisory≥0.228 (lowered from baseline 0.7/0.25).

flags.description: 5 of 6 candidate suppliers (83%) were excluded by hard compliance gates. The policy may be filtering out legitimate suppliers, or the supplier pool is not appropriate for this category.
Only 1 supplier(s) qualified after evaluation. Competitive pricing cannot be guaranteed without market alternatives.

action_logs.rule_description: Sets the minimum number of supplier quotes to 1 for budgets between 0 and 24,999.99 EUR.
action_tuple: WHEN budget >= 0 AND budget <= 24999.99 AND currency = "EUR"
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget >= 0 AND budget <= 24999.99 AND currency = "EUR"

action_logs.rule_description: Sets minimum supplier quotes to 2 for budgets between 25,000 and 99,999.99 EUR
action_tuple: WHEN budget >= 25000 AND budget <= 99999.99 AND currency = "EUR"
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget >= 25000 AND budget <= 99999.99 AND currency = "EUR"

action_logs.rule_description: Requires Procurement Manager approval for budgets between 25,000 and 99,999.99 EUR
action_tuple: WHEN budget >= 25000 AND budget <= 99999.99 AND currency = "EUR"
action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget >= 25000 AND budget <= 99999.99 AND currency = "EUR"

action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget >= 100000 AND budget <= 499999.99 AND currency = "EUR"

action_logs.rule_description: Requires Head of Category escalation for budgets between 100,000 and 499,999.99 EUR

action_logs.when_condition: WHEN budget >= 100000 AND budget <= 499999.99 AND currency = "EUR"

context_notes: Budget-adjusted escalation thresholds (budget=30,000, multiplier=0.91): blocking≥0.639, advisory≥0.228 (lowered from baseline 0.7/0.25).

flags.description: 5 of 6 candidate suppliers (83%) were excluded by hard compliance gates. The policy may be filtering out legitimate suppliers, or the supplier pool is not appropriate for this category.
